description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stocky build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve top and matching pants, both of which appear to be made from a soft, matte fabric. The figure's facial features are clearly defined, with short hair and a neutral expression. His hands are relaxed, with fingers slightly curled, and he is wearing sturdy, closed-toe shoes. The overall appearance suggests casual, everyday attire suitable for urban environments. The surface texture is smooth and consistent, with no visible accessories or carried objects.
description: A stocky adult male in casual, fitted clothing stands upright with arms outstretched, wearing sturdy shoes and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face, chest, and full arm span with hands and fingers visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, torso, and legs, with arm and hand extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shoulders, and legs, with arms fully extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile from the opposite side, with similar features to the left view but mirrored.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and fitted pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
